h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to repeat the correct labels and copy them as instructed.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner merely repeats and follows the step-by-step labeling instructions without demonstrating an actional breakthrough.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown, and the tutor does not change their strategy or introduce a new mechanism.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced as the tutor maintains the same scaffolding throughout.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner merely repeats and follows the step-by-step labeling instructions without demonstrating an actional breakthrough.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown, and the tutor does not change their strategy or introduce a new mechanism.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown, and the tutor does not change their strategy or introduce a new mechanism.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced as the tutor maintains the same scaffolding throughout.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to label the forces on the cart using the 'object on cart' format.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Friction on the cart. More exactly, the table is giving that friction on the cart, to the left.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully applies the 'object on cart' schema to the abstract concept of friction, identifying the table as the acting agent.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The learner performs the task successfully without any breakdown, so no tutor reversal occurs.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced as the tutoring session proceeds smoothly along its initial trajectory.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so no contingent adaptation can occur.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Friction on the cart. More exactly, the table is giving that friction on the cart, to the left.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully applies the 'object on cart' schema to the abstract concept of friction, identifying the table as the acting agent.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so no contingent adaptation can occur.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The learner performs the task successfully without any breakdown, so no tutor reversal occurs.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The learner performs the task successfully without any breakdown, so no tutor reversal occurs.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced as the tutoring session proceeds smoothly along its initial trajectory.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to repeat the definitions of the time signature numbers and their relation to speed.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner repeats the same definitions and actions throughout the dialogue without any breakthrough or shift in task.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor does not change strategy or introduce any new mechanism, instead repeating the same feedback formula throughout.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced by the tutor, who merely repeats the same confirmation pattern.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor does not change strategy or introduce any new mechanism, instead repeating the same feedback formula throughout.
